mano_cua.result_summary: inject插件导致SSR错误：/inject和/api/inject-test均返回internal server error，全新导航首页时页面无限挂起空白，仅缓存页显示Rendered on server: true。inject插件在Nuxt Bridge兼容模式下未能正常工作
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The inject plugin configured in Nuxt Bridge compatibility mode is causing 'internal server error' during SSR. The /inject and /api/inject-test routes both fail. The homepage displays only because it was already rendered and cached, but fresh navigation sometimes hangs. The task's expected behavior is NOT being met - the inject plugin is causing server-side rendering errors. Page title also shows 'undefined'.
